findings.description: Sequential async operations in loop. The for...of loop iterates over modules and awaits scanForModules for each one sequentially, blocking the event loop and preventing concurrent processing of independent module subtrees.
findings.suggested_fix: Refactor to process independent modules concurrently using Promise.all or a concurrency limiter (e.g., p-map). Be mindful of the shared ctxRegistry state which would need to be handled safely.

findings.description: Default instantiation in constructor. The applicationConfig parameter is instantiated with new ApplicationConfig() if not provided, creating a hidden dependency and risking multiple instances of a singleton.
findings.suggested_fix: Remove the default value. Require ApplicationConfig to be explicitly injected by the DI container.

findings.description: Unsafe non-null assertion. modulesGenerator.next().value! assumes the second module always exists.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a conditional check: const rootModule = modulesGenerator.next().value; if (!rootModule) { /* handle error or return */ }.

findings.description: Repeated prototype chain traversal. The reflectKeyMetadata method traverses the prototype chain for every method key, which can become CPU intensive in large applications with deep class hierarchies.
findings.suggested_fix: Implement a metadata cache for the class/method pair, or ensure metadata is flattened during the compilation phase if possible.

findings.description: Missing debug logging. The scanner performs critical bootstrapping operations without logging, making debugging module scanning issues difficult in production.
findings.suggested_fix: Inject a logger instance and add debug-level traces for major lifecycle events (e.g., 'Scanning module [ModuleName]', 'Resolved dependency [X]').

findings.description: Hardcoded string literal. The string 'pipe' is passed to insertInjectable directly, whereas other calls use ENHANCER_KEY_TO_SUBTYPE_MAP.
findings.suggested_fix: Use the constant/enumerator defined for pipes (e.g., ENHANCER_KEY_TO_SUBTYPE_MAP[PIPES_METADATA]) to ensure consistency.

findings.description: Lack of runtime validation in mixin function. If mixinClass is passed as undefined, null, or a non-object, Object.defineProperty will throw a TypeError.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a defensive check: if (!mixinClass || typeof mixinClass !== 'function') { throw new Error('Invalid mixin class provided.'); }.

findings.description: Use of 'any' type in setHttpAdapter. While HTTP adapters can vary, defining a minimal interface would improve type safety.
findings.suggested_fix: Define an AbstractHttpAdapter interface or use a generic type T to ensure basic required methods exist on the adapter.

findings.description: Use of 'any' type in setHttpAdapter. While HTTP adapters can vary (Express, Fastify, etc.), defining a minimal interface would improve type safety.
findings.suggested_fix: Define an AbstractHttpAdapter interface or use a generic type T to ensure basic required methods exist on the adapter.

findings.description: Method visibility. setHttpAdapter is public but may be intended only for internal bootstrapping.
findings.suggested_fix: Consider marking as internal or documenting that it's for framework use only to prevent misuse by end-users.

findings.description: Complexity in constructor. The constructor contains logic to select the ModuleOpaqueKeyFactory.
findings.suggested_fix: If more strategies are added, consider extracting this decision logic into a factory method or a dedicated configuration service to keep the constructor minimal.
